description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image referenced by $BUILD_IMAGE_NAME and caches the vendor/ directory and composer.lock file. Define a variable DEBUG with the value 'on' and configure the pipeline to run only on branch pipelines. Add a test stage containing a phpunit job that runs in the test stage, executes the script ./build/src/test.sh, and applies the coverage pattern /^\s*Lines:\s*\d+.\d+\%/. No artifacts, services, or deployment targets are specified.
